items.title: CVS Health Stock Gains on Guidance Raise. How It Expects to Perform in 2025 and Beyond.
items.description: CVS Health  issued an update to its full-year guidance Tuesday ahead of its annual investor day, pointing to stronger performance in 2025 than previously expected.  CVS now sees total revenue of at least $400 billion, up from $397.3 billion previously and above Wall Street’s forecast for $398.4 billion, according to FactSet.  The owner of the drugstore chain and insurance giant Aetna guided for adjusted earnings in the range of $6.60 to $6.70 a share, compared with a prior range of $6.55 to $6.65.
